import React from 'react'; import '../styles/About.css'; const About = () => { return (

About BookItNow

Your trusted partner in finding the perfect hotel experience

Who We Are

BookItNow is a leading online hotel booking platform dedicated to making hotel reservations easy, affordable, and accessible to travelers worldwide. Founded in 2025, we've quickly established ourselves as a trusted name in the travel and hospitality industry.

Our Mission

Our mission is to revolutionize the way people book hotels by providing a user-friendly platform that connects travelers with a wide range of accommodation options at competitive prices. We believe everyone deserves to find the perfect hotel without hassle.

Our Vision

We envision a world where hotel booking is seamless, transparent, and tailored to each traveler's unique needs. By leveraging technology and customer insights, we aim to become the go-to platform for hotel reservations globally.

Why Choose Us?

  • ✓ Wide selection of hotels worldwide
  • ✓ Best price guarantee
  • ✓ Secure and easy booking process
  • ✓ 24/7 customer support
  • ✓ Flexible cancellation policies
  • ✓ Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
  • ✓ User-friendly mobile and web platforms
  • ✓ Loyalty rewards program

Our Team

Our talented team consists of aspiring engineers from PES University who share a passion for travel and bookings. We are dedicated to revolutionizing the hotel booking experience through innovative technology and exceptional customer service. Every member of our team brings fresh perspectives and cutting-edge skills to create the best platform for travelers worldwide.

By The Numbers

50,000+

Hotels Listed

500,000+

Happy Customers

100+

Countries Covered

1M+

Bookings Completed
